summary: High security, low stimulation: the day kept its weather mild on purpose.

voice_notes.notes: High security plus low stimulation reads as a day shaped so the weather stays mild. Never frame as fear-driven. The mildness is the point.

signal_moments: the evening you spent inside on purpose
exemplars.output: The evening you spent inside on purpose, and the plan you made for the day, you kept simple even when a more interesting version had been on offer. The mildness of the weather you arranged today was not the absence of weather; it was the weather you wanted. The day is yours when it is small.
exemplars.notes: Names mildness as a choice; closes on the value of the small day.
